title: Public Service Support Officer (LPA Project | 4 months)
description:
We are hiring casual staff to be deployed across multiple locations to assist members of the public with their Lasting Power of Attorney (LPA) applications and enquiries. This role involves front-line engagement, guiding citizens through application processes, and delivering quality customer service.

If you enjoy interacting with people, possess strong communication skills, are patient in handling public enquiries, and comfortable performing tasks that require standing for long periods, this role would be a great fit for you.

Job Responsibilities

  • Assist members of the public with LPA-related enquiries

  • Guide citizens in drafting, submission, checking of LPA status, revocation of registered LPA, and payment processes

  • Provide clear explanations and hands-on support during walk-in engagements

  • Deliver friendly and professional customer service at various deployment locations

Requirements

  • Good communication and interpersonal skills

  • Patient and calm when handling public enquiries

  • Friendly, helpful, and approachable personality

  • Able to work independently

  • Comfortable performing tasks that require standing for long periods

  • Comfortable with deployment across different locations

  • Open to candidates of all experience levels

  • Prior customer service or public-facing experience is an advantage

Why Join Us?

  • Flexible short-term employment opportunity

  • Gain experience supporting government-related public services

  • Supportive and friendly team environment

  • Strong resume booster

  • Opportunity to work with friends

    Apply via MyCareersFuture.
    We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

    By applying, you consent to BGC Group Pte Ltd collecting, using, and sharing your personal data for recruitment and job matching, including with our clients and partners. View our Privacy Policy for Job Applicants

    BGC Group Pte Ltd- Outsourcing Division

    EA License No. 05C3053

    Successful applicants will be employed by BGC Group and assigned to our client’s project under a contract arrangement.

postedCompany.description:
BGC Group is an international recruitment and manpower outsourcing firm that identifies and delivers human capital solutions that imperative to every successful company’s growth. 

Having helped 25,000 individuals quickly land rewarding careers in companies that drive industries since our inception in 2005, we believe in developing relationships based on a solid ground of trust between both employers and job-seekers. This is what differentiates us and gives us a competitive edge from the rest. 

Staying true to our vision of Bridging & Growing Careers Because We Care, we are now proudly listed under Omnibridge Holdings on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (08462:HK) in 2017.
